overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city at night. The player moves through wet neon-lit streets, passes a corner kiosk, crosses an intersection near a building with satellite dishes, approaches a massive mega-structure with red lights, then turns and follows a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella along an industrial street. The footage is from a video game with high-quality cinematic rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk street corner at night. The camera moves past a vividly lit corner kiosk with anime-style neon advertisements, turning left onto a wet asphalt street. The massive arched overpass structure looms in the foggy distance while palm trees line the sidewalk.

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a wide wet intersection toward a building topped with satellite dishes. A pedestrian runs across the path from right to left. The massive tower marked 06 rises in the background, while an even larger mega-building with red accent lights becomes visible on the right.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the imposing mega-building with rows of red lights, looking up at its massive scale. After observing the structure and the adjacent tower 07, the camera turns right and moves away, revealing industrial cranes in the distant foggy background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with traffic lights and distant cranes

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a sidewalk in a more industrial area, with large cranes visible in the foggy distance. A pedestrian carrying a distinctive glowing blue umbrella appears ahead and becomes the focal point as the camera follows them down the wet pavement toward a traffic intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk district that gradually shifts from a commercial street corner into a desolate industrial zone. It begins by gliding past a vividly lit kiosk with anime advertisements, turning left onto wet asphalt where palm trees line the way toward a looming arched overpass. As the camera crosses a wide intersection, a pedestrian darts across the path while the view opens up to reveal a skyline of satellite dishes and a massive tower marked 06. The scene then shifts toward an imposing mega-building accented with rows of red lights, looking up at its scale before turning away to reveal distant industrial cranes emerging from the fog. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian carrying a glowing blue umbrella along a wet sidewalk, moving deeper into the industrial area toward a far intersection.
